posts.text:
This week, our MD-08 Local Hero is musician and small businessman extraordinaire Vincent Richardson, founder of Takoma Park's Richardson School of Music. Vincent spreads the joy of music to children, teens and adults throughout our community.

Video

Attorney General Bondi thinks she can play hide-and-go-seek with the Epstein Files, but the law is clear and mandatory. 

She must release the Files in their entirety so we can end this massive coverup and elite protection for predators.

Video

Gun violence continues to be a devastating threat to life and bodily safety in America. Please join me in praying for the victims, the family of the deceased, and all the students, faculty and staff shaken by this attack at Old Dominion University. We must ACT in Congress.


ABC News (@ABC)

LATEST: At least one person was killed and two others were wounded in a shooting at Old Dominion University in Norfolk, Virginia, on Thursday, according to the school's police chief. abcnews.link/itxxw3w

Horrified by this violent attack at a Michigan synagogue. As we learn more, please join me in sending our love and affection to the Temple Israel community. Like everyone in our society, Jewish Americans must have safe places in which to practice our faith.


CBS News (@CBSNews)

An attacker rammed a vehicle into a synagogue in Michigan and was killed. Here's what we know about the incident.  cbsn.ws/4roOvSB




— https://nitter.net/CBSNews/status/2032184854956179540#m

Steven Witkoff says of Putin and his team: “we can take them at their word” about not helping Iran. So we can take Witkoff and Trump at their word—they’re Putin’s little toadies, lapdogs and patsies, wasting a billion dollars a day of American money on an illegal war of aggression and chaos while back in the home office in Moscow, Putin passes secrets to the theocrats of Iran to do damage to our troops.

Now-fired DHS @Sec_Noem lavished $220 million in American taxpayer funds on a self-promoting PR campaign run by close friends. Where’s DOGE's night crew cracking down on wasteful & corrupt spending when you actually need it?

The American people demand an investigation & a refund.

Video

Donald Trump promised to lower costs on Day One, but tens of millions of Americans are struggling to pay for groceries, rent and health care.

The president who has endless funds for an oligarchs’ war in Iran, an obscene White House ballroom and a gold-clad Oval Office is making the American people pay through the nose for basic necessities.

DC Water should explain to affected Montgomery County residents and everyone in the region how they will protect us against the shockingly high levels of E. coli recorded near the C&O Canal and the Potomac River by the Potomac Riverkeeper Network. The sewage spill has generated a lot of fear and frustration among local families who live nearby these treasured waterways.

I feel grateful to the DC Water employees on the ground who are diligently working around the clock to repair the Potomac Inte

Sending all our best wishes for a swift recovery to the two workers who were caught in a collapsed trench in Bethesda.  We thank the first responders who quickly arrived on the scene and rendered aid. fox5dc.com/news/two-workers-…

Trump is charging American taxpayers nearly $1 billion per day to wage a war of aerial bombardment that the elected representatives of the people haven't declared but Trump planned with a group of autocrats and oligarchs. 

This is a war of choice, aggression, and spiraling chaos, and Trump still can’t tell us what its purpose is.

Video

A beautiful afternoon celebrating a new facade for the historic Flower Theater in Silver Spring's Long Branch neighborhood! This investment along the Purple Line corridor is a small part of a big economic and transit transformation in our community. Grateful to work with @GovWesMoore and all our local partners to make sure the Purple Line works for all the people and small businesses in its path.

When President Trump pardoned 1,600 rioters who broke into the Capitol on January 6, 2021, he released numerous violent felons and repeat offenders back into our communities. His pardoned supporters keep committing crimes against other people.


Tisha Lewis FOX 5 DC (@TishaLewis)

NOW
Pardoned January 6th rioter Bryan Betancur was arraigned in court today on an assault and battery charge in Arlington. 

He was released on bond and then arrested in the court’s parking lot on an “outstanding warra

Racism and religious bigotry are the lie—not pluralism—and Andy Ogles doesn’t know the American Constitution, which guarantees Free Exercise of Religion, no Establishment of Religion, Equal Protection and no religious tests for public office.

Ogles is lucky there’s no intelligence test for public office. But Speaker Johnson, a zealous religious believer, should speak out against this hate.


Rep. Andy Ogles (@RepOgles)

Muslims don't belong in American society.

Pluralism is a lie.



— https:/

Happy International Women’s Day! Today we recognize all the women leaders who contributed to moving our country forward and we renew our commitment to fight for equal rights, equal pay and reproductive rights for all.

This week’s Local Hero is Glen Echo Mayor Dia Costello. Thank you, Mayor Costello, for your profound dedication to our people and our community, and for your superb responsiveness and organizing in the wake of the worst sewage spill in American history, the disaster at the Potomac Interceptor. piped.video/watch?v=azESJP7g…

On Wednesday at the Judiciary Committee hearing, America saw why @Sec_Noem had to resign: she refused to retract her outrageous slander of Alex Pretti and Renée Good as “domestic terrorists."

It doesn’t bring back either slain American activist but Noem’s departure gives us a chance to establish investigative cooperation between the Feds and Minnesota in their cases as well as to completely reform the practices of DHS.

Video

🚨 American citizens in UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and Israel: to receive departure assistance from the Department of State about available aviation and ground transportation options, please fill out the following form: mytravel.state.gov/s/crisis-…

Secretary Noem is out, just one day after facing aggressive and unyielding questions from @HouseJudiciary about her shredding of the Constitution and Bill of Rights and institutionalized corruption at DHS.

The next secretary must end ICE and CBP’s reign of lawlessness, terror, deceit and corruption.

Video
